raw: The Trustees GO Pass: -can be used at over 100 Trustees of Reservation properties -covers two adults plus all children (or grandchildren) up to 18 years old -is valid for admission only; it is not valid for discounts at parking kiosks, stores, cafes, inns, campgrounds, special events and programs, on any equipment rental, or in place of any other permits or passes -allows free or reduced admission at the Family Level Membership price Not every Trustees property charges an admission. For information about the admission at each property, please visit TheTrustees.Org.

source_phrases.eligibility_tags: covers two adults plus all children (or grandchildren) up to 18 years old
source_phrases.max_adults: covers two adults plus all children
source_phrases.free_under_age: children (or grandchildren) up to 18 years old
